title: melicope xanthoxyloides
intro: Melicope xanthoxyloides, also known as yellow myrtle or yellow melicope, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions, and it has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts. In traditional medicine, Melicope xanthoxyloides is used to treat a range of ailments, and its use has been supported by some studies, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
